name: Bananas and Cream Bread (for Bread Machines)
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Sour cream or plain yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Add all ingredients except the raisins or nuts, if included, in the order suggested by your bread machine manual and process on the basic bread cycle according to the manufacturer's directions.
2. At the beeper (or at the end of the first kneading in the Panasonic or National), add the raisins or nuts.
